# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in this repository!

## About This Repo

This is Chan Meng's personal GitHub profile README (`ChanMeng666/ChanMeng666`). It is primarily a showcase repository and does not accept code contributions in the traditional sense.

## Ways to Engage

- **Discussions**: Start a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/ChanMeng666/discussions) to ask questions or share feedback.
- **Issues**: Open an issue if you spot a broken link, outdated information, or a technical error in the README.
- **Suggestions**: Feel free to suggest improvements or report problems via issues.

## TechRosie Community

If you are looking to contribute to the **TechRosie** open-source community (which Chan Meng founded), please visit the [TechRosie organization](https://github.com/TechRosie) for active projects that welcome contributions.

For TechRosie contribution guidelines, follow the standard workflow:

1. Fork the relevant TechRosie repository.
2. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature`
3. Commit with [Conventional Commits](https://conventionalcommits.org): `feat: add ...`
4. Open a Pull Request against the `main` branch.

## Code of Conduct

Please follow the [Code of Conduct](.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) in all interactions.
